notes: Focused subset covering the Graph resources the adaptor touches. The msgraph adaptor exposes 6 public operations (create, get, getDrive, getFolder, getFile, uploadFile) against base https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0. Endpoints were confirmed from the adaptor's dist/index.cjs: getDrive hits /drives/{id} or /{owner}/{id}/drive (sites, groups); getFolder hits /drives/{id}/items/{id}/children (or /root:/{path}); getFile hits /drives/{id}/items/{id}/content; uploadFile POSTs /drives/{id}/items/{id}:/{name}:/createUploadSession (or the /sites/{id}/drive equivalent) then PUTs to the returned uploadUrl; create POSTs to any resource (applications shown as the doc example); get is generic (sites/root/lists shown). Reusable shapes (DriveItem, Drive, Site, List, User, Group, Application, Worksheet, UploadSession) were subset by hand from the official Microsoft Graph metadata (CSDL/EDMX converted to OpenAPI, published at microsoftgraph/msgraph-metadata). The full Graph OpenAPI is multi-megabyte and deliberately NOT vendored; only ~17 operations relevant to the adaptor are modeled.
